Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.control
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.control.instantiation_model
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.lemmatagenerator
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.action_history
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.proof
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.ccatch
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.declaration
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.expression.literal
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor
contains classes representing visitors traversing the tree structure of Java programs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.delayedcut
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io
Classes related to loading and saving proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.executor.javadl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct
contains classes representing the meta constructs of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
This package contains the SMT backend of KeY, allowing to translate KeY formulas to formulas in formats such as SMT-LIB, and allowing to send such formulas to SMT solvers such as Simplify or Z3.
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.findprefix
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.ui
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd
 
org.key_project.exploration
 
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.automation
 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule used by de.uka.ilkd.key
    Class
    Description
    BuiltInRule
    Built-in rule interface.
    Rule
    This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.
    UseOperationContractRule
    Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.
    UseOperationContractRule.UseOperationContractRuleApplier

    Taclets are the DL-extension of schematic theory specific rules.

    Class
    Description
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp
    Application for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
    Rule for the application of AuxiliaryContracts.
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation
    This encapsulates all information from the rule application that is needed to apply the rule.
    AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of AbstractBlockContractRule.
    AbstractBlockContractRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    AbstractBuiltInRuleApp
     
    AbstractLoopContractRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder
    This class is used to build various sub-formulas used in the block/loop contract rules.s
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator
    This class contains methods to add the premisses for the block contract rule to the goal.
    BlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of BlockContractInternalRule.
    BlockContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    BuiltInRule
    Built-in rule interface.
    FindTaclet
    An abstract class to represent Taclets with a find part.
    IBuiltInRuleApp
     
    LoopContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp
    The built in rule app for the loop invariant rule.
    RewriteTaclet
    A RewriteTaclet represents a taclet, whose find can be matched against any term in the sequent no matter where it occurs.
    Rule
    This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.
    Taclet
    Taclets are the DL-extension of schematic theory specific rules.
    WhileInvariantRule

  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule used by de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
    Class
    Description
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp
    Application for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
    Rule for the application of AuxiliaryContracts.
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation
    This encapsulates all information from the rule application that is needed to apply the rule.
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiator
    A builder for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiations.
    AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of AbstractBlockContractRule.
    AbstractBlockContractRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    AbstractBlockContractRule.BlockContractHint
     
    AbstractBuiltInRuleApp
     
    AbstractContractRuleApp
     
    AbstractExternalSolverRuleApp
    The rule application that is used when a goal is closed by means of an external solver.
    AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of AbstractLoopContractRule.
    AbstractLoopContractRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule
    An abstract super class for loop invariant rules.
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AdditionalHeapTerms
    A container with data for the additional terms with assertions about the heap; that is, the anonymizing update, the wellformed term, the frame condition and the reachable state formula.
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData
    A container containing data for the anonymizing update, that is the actual update and the anonymized heap.
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation
    A container for an instantiation of this LoopScopeInvariantRule application; contains the update, the program with post condition, the While loop the LoopScopeInvariantRule should be applied to, the LoopSpecification, the self JTerm.
    AbstractLoopInvariantRule.LoopInvariantInformation
    A container object containing the information required for the concrete loop invariant rules to create the sequents for the new goals.
    AntecTaclet
    An AntecTaclet represents a taclet whose find part has to match a top level formula in the antecedent of the sequent.
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder
    This class is used to build various sub-formulas used in the block/loop contract rules.s
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator
    This class contains methods to add the premisses for the block contract rule to the goal.
    BlockContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of BlockContractExternalRule.
    BlockContractExternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    BlockContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of BlockContractInternalRule.
    BlockContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    BuiltInRule
    Built-in rule interface.
    ContractRuleApp
    Represents an application of a contract rule.
    DefaultBuiltInRuleApp
    this class represents an application of a built-in rule application
    ExternalSolverRule
    Interface for the rules of external solvers
    FindTaclet
    An abstract class to represent Taclets with a find part.
    IBuiltInRuleApp
     
    JmlAssertBuiltInRuleApp
    The rule application for JmlAssertRule
    JmlAssertRule
    A rule for JML assert/assume statements.
    LoopApplyHeadBuiltInRuleApp
    Rule application for LoopApplyHeadRule.
    LoopApplyHeadRule
    This rule transforms a block that starts with a for loop into one that starts with a while loop.
    LoopContractExternalBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of LoopContractExternalRule.
    LoopContractExternalRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp
    Application of LoopContractInternalRule.
    LoopContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
    LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp
    The built in rule app for the loop invariant rule.
    LoopScopeInvariantRule
    Implementation of the "loop scope invariant" rule as proposed in the PhD thesis by Nathan Wasser.
    MatchConditions
    Simple container class containing the information resulting from a Taclet.match-call
    NoFindTaclet
    Used to implement a Taclet that has no find part.
    NoPosTacletApp
    A no position taclet application has no position information yet.
    ObserverToUpdateRule
    Implements the rule which translates the toplevel formula {U}[x = rec.query(params);]post to {U}{ x := query(heap, rec, params) }post for model methods.
    OneStepSimplifier.Protocol
    Represents a list of rule applications performed in one OSS step.
    OneStepSimplifierRuleApp
     
    PosTacletApp
    A position taclet application object, contains already the information to which term/formula of the sequent the taclet is attached.
    QueryExpand
    The QueryExpand rule allows to apply contracts or to symbolically execute a query expression in the logic.
    RewriteTaclet
    A RewriteTaclet represents a taclet, whose find can be matched against any term in the sequent no matter where it occurs.
    Rule
    This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.
    SetStatementBuiltInRuleApp
    The rule application for
    invalid reference 
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.SetStatement
    SetStatementRule
    A rule for set statements.
    SuccTaclet
    A SuccTaclet represents a taclet whose find part has to match a top level formula in the succedent of the sequent.
    Taclet
    Taclets are the DL-extension of schematic theory specific rules.
    Taclet.TacletLabelHint
    Instances of this class are used as hints to maintain TermLabels.
    Taclet.TacletLabelHint.TacletOperation
    Defines the possible operations a Taclet performs.
    TacletApp
    A TacletApp object contains information required for a concrete application.
    TacletPrefix
    This class contains the prefix for a Taclet according to M.Gieses paper "Taclet mit Schemavariablen und lokalen Deklarationen" It is used as a data container for the set of all variables bound above the appearance of a SchemaVariable v in a Taclet without all those x not free in v variables
    TacletSchemaVariableCollector
    Collects all schemavariables occurring in the \find, \assumes part or goal description of a taclet.
    UseDependencyContractApp
     
    UseDependencyContractRule
     
    UseOperationContractRule
    Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.
    UseOperationContractRule.AnonUpdateData
     
    UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation
     
    WhileInvariantRule
     
    WhileInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData
     
    WhileInvariantRule.Instantiation
     
    WhileInvariantRule.WhileInvariantRuleApplier.Guard
    Represents a javaBlock which is executed if the trueTerm is true.

    Class
    Description
    MatchConditions
    Simple container class containing the information resulting from a Taclet.match-call

    The variable condition adapter can be used by variable conditions which can either fail or be successful, but which do not create a constraint.

    Taclets are the DL-extension of schematic theory specific rules.

    Description
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
    Rule for the application of AuxiliaryContracts.
    AbstractBlockContractRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder
    This class is used to build various sub-formulas used in the block/loop contract rules.s
    AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator
    This class contains methods to add the premisses for the block contract rule to the goal.
    BlockContractInternalRule
    Rule for the application of BlockContracts.
    BuiltInRule
    Built-in rule interface.
    LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp
    The built in rule app for the loop invariant rule.
    RewriteTaclet
    A RewriteTaclet represents a taclet, whose find can be matched against any term in the sequent no matter where it occurs.
    Rule
    This interface has to be implemented by all classes that want to act as a rule in the calculus.

    WhileInvariantRule.WhileInvariantRuleApplier
